caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She wears a light green top featuring delicate embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. In the initial frames, she speaks with an open mouth while her right hand is raised and moving across her chest. As the sequence progresses, she continues talking, and her right hand shifts position, moving slightly outward and then lowering. A small, circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. The setting remains static and minimalist throughout the clip, with the focus entirely on the woman's facial expressions and hand movements as she delivers her presentation.
